identity.name: PharmaInsight
identity.description: A premium, AI-powered consulting analyst platform for life sciences. It mimics the output and aesthetic of top-tier firms like McKinsey and BCG.

widgets.summary: col-span-1 bg-white border border-slate-200 p-6 rounded-sm shadow-sm
widgets.chart_primary: col-span-2 row-span-2 bg-white border border-slate-200 p-6 rounded-sm shadow-sm
widgets.feed: col-span-1 row-span-2 bg-white border border-slate-200 p-6 rounded-sm shadow-sm

report_view.container: max-w-5xl mx-auto bg-white shadow-lg border border-slate-200 min-h-screen my-8 p-12

card.base: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-sm shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200
card.title: font-serif text-lg font-semibold text-slate-900

button.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium shadow-sm transition-all active:scale-[0.98]
button.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all
button.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-100 rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-all

input.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-400 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-slate-900 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

badge.default: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-slate-200 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-950 focus:ring-offset-2 text-slate-950

visual_enhancers.gradients: NONE - use solid colors for professional look

login_hero.desc: Clean pharmaceutical lab shelving, suggests precision and research

dashboard_bg.desc: Subtle abstract blue water/DNA texture for headers

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid whites and slate-50s.
Use 'Playfair Display' ONLY for h1, h2, and report titles. Use 'Manrope' (or Inter) for everything else.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
The admin panel is hidden. Implement a global keyboard listener for Ctrl+Shift+A to toggle the Admin login modal.
Use the provided image assets for the Login page and Dashboard headers.
Charts must use the custom color palette defined in 'colors.charts'.
Keep the UI 'High Contrast' and 'Print Ready' style.

universal_guidelines.spacing: Use comfortable spacing (p-6, p-8) for dashboard cards to mimic a printed report feel.
universal_guidelines.accessibility: Ensure text contrast ratio is at least 4.5:1. Use slate-700+ for body text.
universal_guidelines.interaction: Buttons should have a subtle active state scale-[0.98]. Inputs should have a distinct ring-2 on focus.
universal_guidelines.motion: Use minimal, professional transitions (duration-200). Avoid bouncy or springy animations. Think 'PowerPoint Slide' smooth, not 'Gaming App' bounce.
